Package neqsim.process.safety.dispersion

Class GasDispersionAnalyzer.FuelData

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.dispersion.GasDispersionAnalyzer.FuelData
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:
GasDispersionAnalyzer
private static final class GasDispersionAnalyzer.FuelData extends Object implements Serializable
Fuel mixture data for flammable endpoint calculations.

  • Constructor Details

    • FuelData

      private FuelData(double fuelMoleFraction, double fuelMassFraction, double fuelMolarMassKgPerMol, double lowerFlammableLimitVolumeFraction)
      Creates fuel data.
      Parameters:
      fuelMoleFraction - fuel mole fraction
      fuelMassFraction - fuel mass fraction
      fuelMolarMassKgPerMol - fuel molar mass in kg/mol
      lowerFlammableLimitVolumeFraction - LFL volume fraction in air

  • Method Details

    • none

      private static GasDispersionAnalyzer.FuelData none()
      Create empty fuel data.
      Returns:
      empty fuel data

    • hasFuel

      private boolean hasFuel()
      Checks if known fuel is present.
      Returns:
      true if fuel fraction and LFL are available
